name: Chicken and Cashew Nuts
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Chicken; beasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large Cashew; nut halves or whole
Canola oil or peanut oil for frying
2 cups Water chestnuts, salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse cashews in cold water and set aside to drain.
2. Prepare marinade by mixing all ingredients with a fork.
3. Put chicken pieces in a large bowl and pour marinade over, mixing well to coat. Marinate at least 20 minutes.
4. Make sweet & sour sauce by mixing all ingredients and when almost boiling add cornstarch and cold water mixture to thicken. Keep warm.
5. Heat oil in a wok. Add cashews and quickly fry for 30 seconds, then remove and drain.
6. Fry marinated chicken until pieces turn white, then drain.
7. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the wok and stir-fry vegetables until onions are clear of color.
8. Return chicken to vegetables, mix well, add seasoning mixture (mix all ingredients), add cashews, and stir everything well.
9. Serve with sauce, eggrolls, and fried rice. Enjoy.
